headline: Mastercard Beats Earnings Estimates. Why the Stock Is Falling.
summary: Mastercard  stock fell Thursday after the card provider reported better-than-expected quarterly earnings.  The company posted adjusted earnings of $4.60 a share for the first quarter, up from $3.73 a year ago and above analysts’ consensus estimate of $4.41, according to FactSet.  Mastercard boosted the high end of its outlook for 2026 revenue growth.

raw.headline: Mastercard Beats Earnings Estimates. Why the Stock Is Falling.

Mastercard boosted the high end of its outlook for 2026 revenue growth.

headline: Four Titans Report, Oil Hits $120, and Powell Draws a Line in the Sand
summary: If you went to bed early on Wednesday, you missed a lot. Four of the biggest companies in the world reported quarterly earnings within minutes of each other and all four beat expectations. That alone would have made it a notable session. But layered on top of that was oil surging near $120 a barrel, a Federal Reserve meeting, and a Fed chair who refused to leave. Quiet, it was not.

raw.headline: Four Titans Report, Oil Hits $120, and Powell Draws a Line in the Sand
raw.summary: If you went to bed early on Wednesday, you missed a lot. Four of the biggest companies in the world reported quarterly earnings within minutes of each other and all four beat expectations. That alone would have made it a notable session. But layered on top of that was oil surging near $120 a barrel, a Federal Reserve meeting, and a Fed chair who refused to leave. Quiet, it was not.

headline: Why Visa (V) Is Up 7.6% After Earnings Beat, New Buyback And Stablecoin-AI Expansion
summary: Visa recently reported fiscal second-quarter 2026 results showing revenue of US$11.23 billion and net income of US$6.02 billion, alongside a new US$20 billion share repurchase authorization and a declared quarterly dividend of US$0.67 per Class A share. Beyond headline numbers, Visa is leaning further into higher-margin and emerging areas, expanding its stablecoin settlement pilot across nine blockchains and rolling out its Agentic Ready AI-commerce program across Asia Pacific and Latin...
